title: Throwable Fire Charge
description: This datapack allows players to launch fireballs by right-clicking while holding a Fire Charge
body:
# Throwable Fire Charge

![Shoot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43190e44a8b5afae537f6a8ee8b4d34a24dd0b9d.gif)

## Commands
- **/scoreboard players set #power ft_config <value>**  
  > **Changes the fireball's explosion radius.**
- **/scoreboard players set #speed ft_config  <value>** 
  > **Adjusts how fast the fireball travels.**
- **/function fc:reset**                                
  > **Restores default speed and power**
